terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptanceDesc: By accessing and using Flowist, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement.
terms.licenseDesc: Permission is granted to temporarily use Flowist for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only.
terms.userDataDesc: All notes and data are stored locally on your device. You are responsible for backing up your data regularly.
terms.disclaimerDesc: The app is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. We do not guarantee that the app will be error-free or uninterrupted.
terms.limitationsDesc: In no event shall Flowist or its suppliers be liable for any damages arising out of the use or inability to use the app.
terms.modificationsDesc: We may revise these terms at any time without notice. By using this app, you agree to be bound by the current version of these terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.infoCollectDesc: Flowist stores all your notes and data locally on your device. We do not collect, transmit, or store any personal information on external servers.
privacy.localStorageDesc: Your notes, folders, and settings are stored using your device's local storage. This data remains on your device and is not accessible to us.
privacy.dataSecurityDesc: Since all data is stored locally, the security of your information depends on your device's security measures. We recommend using device encryption and strong passwords.
privacy.thirdPartyDesc: We do not use any third-party analytics or tracking services. Your data is completely private and stays on your device.
privacy.dataBackupDesc: You can backup your data using the backup feature. Backup files are stored on your device and you control where they are kept.
privacy.changesDesc: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

help.title: Help & Feedback
help.gettingStartedDesc: Create your first note by tapping the "+" button on the home screen. Choose from various note types including sticky notes, lined notes, Cornell notes, and more.
help.organizingDesc: Use folders to organize your notes. Long-press on a note to move it to a different folder or pin it to the top.
help.backupRestoreDesc: Regularly backup your data using the "Back up data" option. Keep your backup files in a safe location like cloud storage.
help.issueNotSaving: Notes not saving? Check your device storage space.
help.issueSlow: App running slow? Try clearing old notes or creating a backup and reinstalling.
help.issueLostData: Lost data? Restore from your latest backup file.
help.contactSupportDesc: For additional help or to report issues, please contact us through the app store review section or reach out via our support channels.
help.feedbackDesc: We value your feedback! Let us know how we can improve Flowist by rating the app and leaving a review.

onboarding.info1Point3: Our system transforms your habits into tools that help you stay on track.

onboarding.wsStructuredDesc: I prefer a clear schedule with set times for everything.
onboarding.wsFlexibleDesc: I like to adjust my plans as the day unfolds.
onboarding.wsSprintsDesc: I work in intense bursts followed by breaks.
onboarding.wsMultitaskDesc: I juggle multiple tasks and projects simultaneously.
onboarding.info2Point1: Users who track daily see 3x more productivity gains.
onboarding.info2Point2: Your brain works better with organized systems — Flowist does the heavy lifting.
onboarding.info2Point3: Small daily wins lead to massive life changes over time.

onboarding.showcaseAnalyticsDesc: Track your productivity score, view task analytics, and get weekly progress reports.

onboarding.showcaseTitle: How Flowist Helps You Get There
onboarding.showcaseSubtitle: Everything you need to stay productive, all in one app.
onboarding.builtWithCare: Built with care to help you stay organized, focused, and in control of your day
onboarding.energyBirdDesc: I'm most productive in the morning and wind down by evening.
onboarding.energyOwlDesc: I do my best work late at night when it's quiet.
onboarding.energyAfternoonDesc: My energy and focus peak in the afternoon hours.
onboarding.energyVariesDesc: My productive hours change depending on the day.
onboarding.energySubtitle: Understanding your peak hours helps us optimize your schedule.
onboarding.infoPersonalizedTitle: Great choices, {{name}}! Here's What We'll Set Up for You
onboarding.infoPersonalizedPoint1: A personalized workspace tailored to your goals and work style.
onboarding.infoPersonalizedPoint2: Smart scheduling and reminders based on your preferences.
onboarding.infoPersonalizedPoint3: Achievement tracking and streaks to keep you motivated every day.
onboarding.infoGoalStudy: Study planner with focus timers, revision reminders, and note organization to boost your learning.
onboarding.infoGoalWork: Professional task management with deadlines, priorities, and smart scheduling for your career.
onboarding.infoGoalPersonal: Daily life organizer with routines, habits, and gentle reminders to stay on track.
onboarding.infoGoalCreative: Creative workspace with sketching, notes, and project boards to bring your ideas to life.
onboarding.infoGoalHealth: Wellness tracker with habit streaks, fitness goals, and daily health check-ins.
onboarding.infoGoalOther: A flexible workspace that adapts to whatever you need — fully customizable for your workflow.
onboarding.infoExpBeginner: We'll guide you step by step with tips and simple workflows to get started easily.
onboarding.infoExpIntermediate: Smart suggestions and shortcuts to level up your existing productivity habits.
onboarding.infoExpAdvanced: Power features, automation, and advanced customization for maximum efficiency.
onboarding.frustrationSubtitle: This helps us show you how Flowist does it better.

certificates.shareDescription: Download your certificate image and share it on LinkedIn, Instagram, Twitter, or any platform!
certificates.completeRequirements: Complete all requirements to unlock sharing
certificates.dedicationPaidOff: Your dedication has paid off. You've earned the {{title}} certificate!

weekend_warrior.name: Weekend Warrior
weekend_warrior.description: Complete tasks on both Saturday and Sunday

sketch.stickerHint: Select strokes and tap to save as a reusable sticker.

sketch.recordAudioHint:
Record audio while drawing.
Strokes sync with playback.

sketch.setAMarker: Set A marker at current position
sketch.setBMarker: Set B marker at current position
sketch.audioRecordingStarted: Audio recording started — draw to sync!
sketch.tapToPlaceSticky: Tap canvas to place a sticky note

sketchVideo.pasteDescription: Paste a YouTube URL to embed & take notes while watching

sketchLibrary.title: Sketch Library
sketchLibrary.createNotebookHint: Create a notebook to organize your sketches

team.title: Team Collaboration
team.noTeamsHint: Create a team or join one with an invite code
team.createHint: A unique 6-digit invite code will be generated for your team.
team.joinHint: Enter the 6-digit code shared by the team owner.
team.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete the team and remove all members. This action cannot be undone.
team.leaveConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave this team?
team.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this member from the team?
team.proDescription: Team Collaboration is available for Pro users. Upgrade to create teams, share invite codes, and collaborate with others.
team.signInRequired: Please sign in to use Team Collaboration.

sharedTasks.title: Shared Tasks
sharedTasks.noListsHint: Create a list to start collaborating on tasks
sharedTasks.deleteListConfirm: This will delete the list and all its tasks. This cannot be undone.
sharedTasks.deleteTaskConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this task?

cert.nameAppearOnCert: This name will appear on the shared certificate image

security.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 4 characters
security.noSecurityQuestion: No security question has been set up for password recovery.
security.setupSecurityInSettings: You can set up a security question in the Hidden Notes settings after unlocking.
security.setupSecurityDesc: Set up a security question to recover your password if you forget it.
security.answerMinLength: Answer must be at least 2 characters
security.answerVerifyDesc: This answer will be used to verify your identity if you forget your password.
security.motherMaidenName: What is your mother's maiden name?
security.firstPetName: What was the name of your first pet?
security.birthCity: What city were you born in?
security.elementarySchool: What was the name of your elementary school?
